---
title: "Oregon Department of Environmental Quality"
year: 2023
image: /images/skagit-wa.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Skagit County, Washington"
categories: ["Rate Setting", "Transfer/MRF/Transport"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
Mr. Bell assisted Oregon DEQ with cost modeling for the state's recycling
infrastructure and program costs. Data points from collection and processing
operations throughout Oregon were analyzed and aggregated to estimate the cost
and operational impacts from alternative system scenarios. DEQ utilized the
project's findings to assist with the drafting of Senate Bill 582, which became
Oregon's extended producer responsibility law.

[Report](https://www.oregon.gov/deq/recycling/Documents/RMAModeling.pdf)
:::
